    1. createShopButton(ShopItem, GamePaneImage, Runnable)

Interface Shopable

All Superinterfaces:
Normal
All Known Implementing Classes:
ChulaPopup, DomePopup, GymPopup, MallPopup, ParkPopup, RestaurantPopup, TravelPopup
public interface Shopable extends Normal
Helper interface for popups that show a list of purchasable/selectable ShopItems.

    Description
    default javafx.scene.control.Button
    createShopButton(ShopItem item, GamePaneImage gamePane, Runnable refreshUI)
    Creates a button for a ShopItem.

  • Method Details

    • createShopButton

      default javafx.scene.control.Button createShopButton(ShopItem item, GamePaneImage gamePane, Runnable refreshUI)
      Creates a button for a ShopItem. When clicked, it checks the player's money and check if the player can afford it.
